MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Shoreview Apartments, is present. Represented by Crystal Frank.
Attorney, Ivy Tsen, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Bridgette Anderson, is present.
Attorney, Jessica Alexandra, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-22-2010 is vacated.
